gate.metric: (failingSections, escapes) manager-vantage on the 3rd org (Northwind Aviation), frontier-exhausted, on a fresh demo-up
gate.target: (0, 0) + dashboard ENABLED + ~80% all-3-complete + 1 hero STARTED + 1 COMPLETED

qualitative_gate_conditions.note: iter-07 (closed-no-lift) applied the user-chosen M48 CLOSED-CYCLE alternative to the iter-06 platform perf wall: cycle active->closed + a frozen ai_readiness_snapshots row per member (platform-model-scored; Aria=stage3/champion, Ben=stage1/standby, Dana=none). Re-seeded demo-1 CLEANLY (the 8 ai_readiness_* tables added to stackseed --reset + the new --reload-sentinel). DB VERIFIED correct: cycle closed, 199 frozen snapshots, 78.4% stage-3. But the GATED manager sweep HELD at (failing=5, escapes=0): HYPOTHESIS PARTIALLY FALSIFIED. An authenticated network probe proved the platform FE's DEFAULT dashboard GET fires the LIVE path (no ?cycle=, never completes) and never fires the /cycles list that would supply latestClosedCycle.id, so the fast frozen path (app buildResponseFromSnapshots, reachable ONLY for CycleID!=nil && status=='closed') is never taken by the default call. Closing the gap is PLATFORM-bound. The closed-cycle data + --reload-sentinel tooling are KEPT (correct + reusable; the cycle picker / a ?cycle= deep-link renders the fast frozen dashboard).

blocker.summary: iter-08 applied the user-chosen run-5 DEEP-LINK strategy (point the cockpit jump_to + coverage manifest at ?cycle=<latest-closed-cycle-id> so the FE fires the cycle-scoped GET -> the fast frozen path). The mandated cheap probe FIRST (an authed dual-endpoint DIRECT probe) FALSIFIED it: /cycles is fast (40ms) but the frozen data GET ?cycle=<closed> NEVER completes (180s timeout), because app buildResponseFromSnapshots reads the frozen scores fast then calls loadMembers(org, "") -- a full unbounded org-member hydration -- which at 200 members is the SAME org-scale wall (NOT the demo-patchable targetRole authz RPC; jobRole is a SQL column). So the deep-link is INERT -- 'frozen' froze the SCORES, not the RESPONSE. Stronger falsification than iter-07 (which showed only the DEFAULT FE route omits ?cycle=). No cockpit/manifest edit made (would ship a hanging ?cycle=), no sweep run (would reconfirm 5). Gate cannot reach (0,0) without one of: (a) a disclosed-presenter-note residual (data proven-correct in DB, slow-only) with the user's EXPLICIT sign-off (NOT self-granted -- would loosen the gate to force a pass), (b) escalate a platform edit (bound loadMembers in the snapshot path via restrictUserIDs, OR add a frozen_tags jsonb column [M314b] so the snapshot read needn't re-join live members) = unimplementable-without-platform-edit, or (c) a new app read-path demo-patch bounding loadMembers in the snapshot path (the app-targetrole-authz-skip precedent, a new tooling investment NOT in the run-5 brief).
